description: Computes and displays the tangent plane to a 3D surface at a given point. Works with plot3d (explicit surfaces) and paraplot3d (parametric surfaces). Uses partial derivatives for linear approximation.
utility: Display the tangent plane to a 3D surface at a given point

arguments.name: surface
arguments.description: The surface to compute tangent plane for — a plot3d/paraplot3d variable or a quoted equation string

arguments.name: x
arguments.description: x-coordinate (or u for parametric surfaces) of tangent point, or a point3d reference

arguments.name: y
arguments.description: y-coordinate (or v for parametric surfaces) of tangent point (omit when using point3d)

arguments.name: size
arguments.description: Visual size of the tangent plane (default: 4)

alternates.description: Tangent plane using inline string equation at (x, y)
Tangent plane at coordinates (x, y) on a plot3d surface
Tangent plane with custom visual size
Tangent plane at a point3d location (uses x, y from point)
Tangent plane at parameter values (u, v) on a paraplot3d surface

examples.scenario: Tangent plane to paraboloid with animated x position
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(1,9), view(21.1, 22.2))
f(x, y) = x^2 + y^2
P = plot3d(G, f, range(-3, 3), range(-3, 3))
varanim_1 = variableanimator(at(6,37), "x0", 1, -2, "text(Tangent At)")
y0 = 1
pt = point3d(G, x0, y0, f(x0, y0))
T = tangentplane(G, P, x0, y0)

examples.scenario: Tangent plane from string equation with size
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
T = tangentplane(G, "x^2 + y^2", 1, 1, 5)
